families.description: Indexed FastNear REST endpoints for account views, public-key lookups, and system status.
families.name: FastNear API

families.description: REST endpoints for indexed key-value history and latest-state lookups across NEAR contracts.
families.name: KV FastData API

families.description: REST endpoints for finalized and optimistic block data, headers, shards, and block streams.
families.name: NEAR Data API

families.description: REST endpoints for transaction, block, account-history, and receipt lookups backed by indexed data.
families.name: Transactions API

families.description: REST endpoints for indexed transfer history and pagination over account transfer activity.
families.name: Transfers API

families.description: JSON-RPC methods for account state, balances, and access-key lookups on NEAR.
families.name: Account RPC

families.description: JSON-RPC methods for block lookup, block effects, and block-oriented reads on NEAR.
families.name: Block RPC

families.description: JSON-RPC methods for contract calls, contract code inspection, and contract state queries.
families.name: Contract RPC

families.description: JSON-RPC methods for protocol status, gas, chunks, proofs, and network configuration.
families.name: Protocol RPC

families.description: JSON-RPC methods for transaction submission, receipt lookup, and transaction status checks.
families.name: Transaction RPC

families.description: JSON-RPC methods for validator sets, epochs, and validator-ordering reads.
families.name: Validators RPC

operations.description: Ping the FastNEAR API for liveness — returns `{status: ok}` when healthy.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - Health
operations.name: FastNEAR API - Health

operations.description: Check the current indexed block height, latency, and deployed service version.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - Status
operations.name: FastNEAR API - Status

operations.description: Fetch the fungible token contract IDs an account has held — contract IDs only, no balances.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V0 Account FT
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V0 Account FT
operations.summary: Lookup fungible token contract IDs for an account

operations.description: Fetch the NFT contract IDs an account has held — contract IDs only, no block-height metadata.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V0 Account NFT
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V0 Account NFT
operations.summary: Lookup NFT contract IDs for an account

operations.description: Fetch staking pool account IDs for one account — pool IDs only, no block-height metadata.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V0 Account Staking
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V0 Account Staking
operations.summary: Lookup staking pool account IDs for an account

operations.description: Fetch the account IDs that have registered a full-access public key, via the legacy V0 lookup path.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V0 Public Key Lookup
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V0 Public Key Lookup
operations.summary: Lookup full-access accounts by public key

operations.description: List every account tied to a public key — full-access and limited-access keys together — via the legacy V0 lookup-all path.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V0 Public Key Lookup (All)
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V0 Public Key Lookup (All)
operations.summary: Lookup all indexed accounts by public key

operations.description: Fetch an account's fungible token balance rows, each with contract ID, balance, and last-update block height.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 Account FT
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 Account FT
operations.summary: Lookup indexed fungible token rows for an account

operations.description: Fetch the combined indexed account view, including staking pools, FT balances, NFTs, and account state.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 Account Full
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 Account Full

operations.description: Fetch NFT contract rows for an account, including block-height metadata for each contract.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 Account NFT
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 Account NFT
operations.summary: Lookup indexed NFT contract rows for an account

operations.description: Retrieve staking pool rows for an account, including block-height metadata for each pool relationship.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 Account Staking
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 Account Staking
operations.summary: Lookup indexed staking pools for an account

operations.description: Fetch the top-balance holder list for a fungible token contract, ranked highest balance first.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 FT Top Holders
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 FT Top Holders
operations.summary: Lookup top indexed holders for a fungible token

operations.description: Resolve a full-access public key to the indexed NEAR accounts that have registered it — V1 canonical lookup path.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 Public Key Lookup
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 Public Key Lookup
operations.summary: Lookup full-access accounts by public key

operations.description: Resolve a public key to every account that holds it — full-access and limited-access keys alike — via the V1 lookup-all path.
operations.headline: FastNEAR API - V1 Public Key Lookup (All)
operations.name: FastNEAR API - V1 Public Key Lookup (All)
operations.summary: Lookup all indexed accounts by public key

operations.description: Fetch the latest values for all contracts touched by one predecessor account.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - All Latest Keys by Predecessor
operations.name: KV FastData API - All Latest Keys by Predecessor
operations.summary: Fetch latest key-value rows for one predecessor across all contracts

operations.description: Fetch every historical write for one exact key under one predecessor and contract.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - History by Exact Key
operations.name: KV FastData API - History by Exact Key
operations.summary: Fetch historical rows for one exact key under one predecessor and contract

operations.description: Fetch the latest value for one exact key under one predecessor and contract.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - Latest by Exact Key
operations.name: KV FastData API - Latest by Exact Key
operations.summary: Fetch the latest row for one exact key under one predecessor and contract

operations.description: Fetch historical FastData rows for one target account across all predecessor accounts.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - History by Account
operations.name: KV FastData API - History by Account
operations.summary: Fetch historical key-value writes for one contract across all predecessors

operations.description: Fetch the historical values for a selected key across accounts and predecessors.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - History by Global Key
operations.name: KV FastData API - History by Global Key
operations.summary: Fetch historical rows by exact key across all indexed contracts

operations.description: Fetch historical FastData rows for a single predecessor and target account.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - History by Predecessor
operations.name: KV FastData API - History by Predecessor
operations.summary: Fetch historical key-value writes for one predecessor and contract

operations.description: Fetch the latest FastData rows for one target account across all predecessor accounts.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - Latest by Account
operations.name: KV FastData API - Latest by Account
operations.summary: Fetch latest key-value rows for one contract across all predecessors

operations.description: Fetch the latest FastData rows for a single predecessor and target account.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - Latest by Predecessor
operations.name: KV FastData API - Latest by Predecessor
operations.summary: Fetch latest key-value rows for one predecessor and contract

operations.description: Fetch the latest FastData row for up to 100 keys in a single request.
operations.headline: KV FastData API - Multi-Key Lookup
operations.name: KV FastData API - Multi-Key Lookup
operations.summary: Fetch the latest rows for multiple fully qualified keys

operations.description: Ping the neardata service for liveness — returns `{status: ok}` when healthy, errors otherwise.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Health
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Health

operations.description: Fetch a finalized block's full document at a chosen height — header plus every chunk and shard payload.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Block
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Block
operations.summary: Fetch a finalized block by height

operations.description: Fetch one chunk — a single shard's transactions and incoming receipts — at a chosen block height.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Block Chunk
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Block Chunk
operations.summary: Fetch one chunk from a finalized block

operations.description: Fetch only a finalized block's header and chunk summaries — no per-shard payload.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Block Headers
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Block Headers
operations.summary: Fetch the block-level object for a finalized block

operations.description: Fetch an optimistic (not-yet-final) block at a chosen height — may redirect once the optimistic window has finalized.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Optimistic Block
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Optimistic Block
operations.summary: Fetch an optimistic block by height

operations.description: Fetch one shard's full payload at a chosen block — chunk plus state changes and produced receipts.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Block Shard
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Block Shard
operations.summary: Fetch one shard from a finalized block

operations.description: Redirect to the chain's first post-genesis block — a starting cursor for indexers backfilling from the beginning.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - First Block
operations.name: NEAR Data API - First Block
operations.summary: Redirect to the first block after genesis

operations.description: Redirect to the most recent finalized block — the chain-tip cursor once consensus has settled.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Last Final Block
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Last Final Block
operations.summary: Redirect to the latest finalized block

operations.description: Redirect to the most recent optimistic block — the freshest-possible tip, ahead of final settlement.
operations.headline: NEAR Data API - Last Optimistic Block
operations.name: NEAR Data API - Last Optimistic Block
operations.summary: Redirect to the latest optimistic block

operations.description: Fetch account transaction history with optional filters for signer, success status, and sort order.
operations.headline: Transactions API - Account History
operations.name: Transactions API - Account History

operations.description: Fetch a block row by height or hash and optionally expand its transactions and receipts.
operations.headline: Transactions API - Block Lookup
operations.name: Transactions API - Block Lookup
operations.summary: Fetch a block by height or hash

operations.description: Fetch a bounded list of indexed blocks ordered ascending or descending.
operations.headline: Transactions API - Block Range
operations.name: Transactions API - Block Range

operations.description: Fetch a receipt by ID along with the transaction that produced it.
operations.headline: Transactions API - Receipt Lookup
operations.name: Transactions API - Receipt Lookup

operations.description: Fetch up to 20 indexed transactions by hash in one request.
operations.headline: Transactions API - Transactions by Hash
operations.name: Transactions API - Transactions by Hash

operations.description: Fetch transfer rows for one account with optional direction, asset, amount, and time filters.
operations.headline: Transfers API - Query Transfers
operations.name: Transfers API - Query Transfers

operations.description: Fetch one access key's permissions and nonce by public key on a given account.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View access key
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View access key

operations.description: Fetch every access key attached to an account, each with its permissions and nonce.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View access key list
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View access key list

operations.description: Fetch an account's balance, storage usage, and code hash at a chosen block or finality.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View account
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View account

operations.description: Fetch a block's header and chunk summaries by its height in the chain.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get block by height
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get block by height

operations.description: Fetch a block's header and chunk summaries by its SHA-256 hash.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get block by hash
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get block by hash

operations.description: Summarize every state change in a block — which accounts, keys, and contract-state entries were touched.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get block effects
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get block effects

operations.description: Invoke a contract view method without gas or state changes — reads computed values from contract logic.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Call contract function
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Call contract function

operations.description: Fetch the compiled WebAssembly bytes deployed directly to a single account.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View contract code
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View contract code

operations.description: Look up a global contract's WebAssembly bytes by its SHA-256 code hash.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View global contract code
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View global contract code

operations.description: Look up a global contract's WebAssembly bytes by the account that registered it.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View global contract code by account
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View global contract code by account
operations.summary: View global contract code by account

operations.description: Fetch the raw key-value state a contract has written, optionally filtered by key prefix.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: View contract state
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: View contract state

operations.description: Fetch detailed state changes in a block — filter by account, key prefix, or change type.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get state changes
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get state changes

operations.description: Fetch a single chunk's transactions and receipts by its parent block plus shard index.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get chunk by block and shard
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get chunk by block and shard
operations.summary: Get chunk by block and shard

operations.description: Fetch a single chunk's transactions and receipts by its content hash.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get chunk by hash
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get chunk by hash

operations.description: Fetch the node's own local client config — timeouts, retry settings, and operator-chosen parameters.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get client config
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get client config

operations.description: Measure a single shard's congestion pressure at a chosen block — a 0.0-to-1.0 saturation score.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get congestion level
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get congestion level

operations.description: Fetch a Merkle proof that a block is included in the light client's verified chain.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get light client block proof
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get light client block proof

operations.description: Fetch a Merkle proof of transaction or receipt inclusion — the EXPERIMENTAL alias of `light_client_proof`.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get light client execution proof
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get light client execution proof

operations.description: Fetch the runtime protocol config at a chosen block — gas costs, storage prices, and limits currently in force.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get protocol config
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get protocol config

operations.description: Inspect a node's split-storage layout — the boundary between hot recent data and cold archival data.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get split storage info
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get split storage info

operations.description: Fetch the current chain-wide gas price for the most recent block.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get gas price
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get gas price

operations.description: Fetch the chain-wide gas price at a chosen historical block, by height or hash.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get gas price by block
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get gas price by block

operations.description: Fetch the chain's immutable genesis config — initial records, protocol settings, and epoch length at block 0.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get genesis config
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get genesis config

operations.description: Ping a node for liveness — returns `null` on success, an error on unhealthy state.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Check node health
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Check node health

operations.description: Fetch the latest final block — finality set automatically, no block ID needed.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Latest Block
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Latest Block

operations.description: Fetch a Merkle proof that a transaction or receipt was included and executed, suitable for light-client verification.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get light client proof
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get light client proof

operations.description: Find upcoming block ranges where a validator can safely restart without missing block production.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get maintenance windows
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get maintenance windows

operations.description: Retrieves Prometheus-format node metrics from the HTTP `/metrics` endpoint. Requires an API key.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Node Metrics
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Node Metrics

operations.description: List the node's active peer connections and the block producers it currently tracks.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get network info
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get network info

operations.description: Advance a light client's verified chain by fetching the next block header after a known head.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get next light client block
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get next light client block

operations.description: Fetch a node's binary version, sync progress, and head block in one snapshot.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get node status
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get node status

operations.description: Submit a signed transaction and immediately get its hash — no wait for execution.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Send transaction asynchronously
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Send transaction asynchronously

operations.description: Submit a signed transaction and wait for its commit — the legacy synchronous send, superseded by `send_tx`.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Send transaction and wait
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Send transaction and wait

operations.description: Fetch a single receipt by ID — the cross-shard execution unit a transaction produces.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get receipt by ID
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get receipt by ID

operations.description: Fetch a transaction's full receipt tree and per-receipt outcomes — richer than `tx_status`.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get detailed transaction status
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get detailed transaction status

operations.description: Submit a signed transaction and wait for its final execution outcome — the current synchronous send.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Send transaction
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Send transaction

operations.description: Check a transaction's final outcome by hash — succeeded, failed, or still unresolved.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get transaction status
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get transaction status

operations.description: List validators ordered by stake size at a chosen block — broader than just the current active set.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get validators ordered
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get validators ordered

operations.description: Fetch the validator set for a chosen past epoch, selected by epoch-start block height or hash.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get validators by epoch
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get validators by epoch

operations.description: Fetch the active validator set for the current epoch, with stakes and performance stats.
operations.headline: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get current validators
operations.name: NEAR Protocol RPC: Get current validators
